## Summary

Describe the user-visible change in 1-3 sentences. This text should be close to what we would want in release notes.

## Release Notes

- User-facing summary:
- Upgrade action required: no
- Breaking change: no

## Checklist

- [ ] PR title is a user-facing summary, not just a branch name
- [ ] I added labels that match the release-note category when appropriate
- [ ] I noted any upgrade or migration action above

## Testing

- [ ] Not run
- [ ] Existing tests
- [ ] New tests
